parameters.query: SELECT city, sector, COUNT(*) as event_count, SUM(value_amount) as total_value FROM procurement_events WHERE publication_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY city, sector ORDER BY event_count DESC;

nodes.name: Fetch Weekly Procurement Stats
nodes.notes: Configure Postgres credentials in n8n credentials

parameters.query: SELECT event_type, title, city, country, sector, source_url, why_it_matters, confidence_score FROM editorial_queue WHERE status IN ('new','needs_research') AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY confidence_score DESC LIMIT 20;

parameters.query: INSERT INTO weekly_reports (week_start, week_end, title, report_markdown) VALUES ('{{ $json.week_start }}', '{{ $json.week_end }}', 'Weekly Regional Intelligence Report', '{{ $json.report_markdown }}');
